items.required_evidence: 30 日連続稼働の run log。主要シナリオの成功率、human intervention 件数、unknown error 率を含む。

ref_requirements.description: 30-day run summary or completed EV-30DAY-OPS template
Trace files or trace bundle covering the operation window
Incident summary or explicit no-incident statement

items.required_evidence: 外部 contributor が good-first-issue を 1 週間以内に merge した PR。issue、PR、review、merge date を含む。
acceptance_criteria: contributor is external to maintainer team
merge completed within 7 days of contributor start
issue URL, PR URL, and review or merge record are present
items.verification_artifact: docs/operator/PRODUCTION_EVIDENCE_COLLECTION.md, GitHub issue / PR URL, docs/developer/GOOD_FIRST_ISSUES.md slice

ref_requirements.description: GitHub issue URL for the good-first-issue
GitHub pull request URL for the merged external contribution
Review, merge, or completed contribution evidence template

items.required_evidence: 外部 FDE / SI が fork なしで 1 件の顧客導入を完了した evidence。customer overlay、migration note、deployment runbook、postmortem を含む。
acceptance_criteria: external FDE or SI completed one customer deployment
customer overlay evidence excludes secrets and customer PII
mission, pipeline, trace, or screenshot artifact proves the deployment scenario ran

ref_requirements.description: Deployment summary, postmortem, or completed EV-FDE-DEPLOY template
Customer overlay evidence with secrets excluded
Mission, pipeline, trace, or screenshot artifact proving the scenario ran
Statement that no fork was required or rejected status explaining the blocker
